Adelphos AI

Agentic Services

Managed services where Adelphos runs the agent against your business — finances, project management, document control and email-driven deliverables.

Managed modules

The agent runs continuously against your live data. 30-minute onboarding call to get started.

Agentic Module

AI Finances

Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data.

  • Automated Reconciliation
  • Cash-flow Forecasting
  • Management Accounts

Agentic Module

AI Project Management

Programme tracking, risk registers and reporting — the agent keeps the project on rails.

  • Programme Tracking
  • Risk Register
  • Status Reporting

Agentic Module

AI Document Controller

Transmittals, registers, revision tracking — the agent runs your document control.

  • Transmittal Processing
  • Revision Tracking
  • Approval Chasing

Email services

Bespoke email per service. Forward a brief, get the deliverable.

Email Service

Specification Writer

Forward a brief, receive a complete MEP specification section.

  • NBS Clause Selection
  • Project Variables
  • Formatted Output
specs@adelphos.ai Learn more
Email Service

Revit Modelling Agent

Email a markup, receive the Revit model update.

  • Markup Interpretation
  • Model Execution
  • Change Summary
model@adelphos.ai Learn more
Email Service

COBie Generator

Forward the model, receive a validated COBie deliverable.

  • Asset Extraction
  • Schema Validation
  • Gap Analysis
cobie@adelphos.ai Learn more
Email Service

Schematic Designer

Describe the system, receive a production-ready schematic.

  • System Interpretation
  • Annotated Output
  • DWG + PDF

Ready to put Adelphos to work?
